description: A FOIA request seeks the following records: the names of post-9/11 detainees, found on documents that traditionally have been public.

_provenance.case_name: Center for National Security Studies v. DOJ
_provenance.record_description_quote: the names of post-9/11 detainees, found on documents that traditionally have been public
_provenance.note: Even records traditionally public can be (b)(7) when compiled for law-enforcement purpose pursuing a federal-law violation + national security breach.
